title: Crab Rage
description: When an ally dies, this creature gains [blue]5[/blue] [gold]Strength[/gold] and [blue]99[/blue] [gold]Block[/gold].
smart_description: When an ally dies, [gold]this creature[/gold] gains [blue]6[/blue] [gold]Strength[/gold] and [blue]99[/blue] [gold]Block[/gold].
notes: Grants Strength (6) and Block (99) when an ally on the same side dies. The AfterDeath trigger only activates if the dying creature is on the owner's side and is not the owner itself. Note: The localization description lists Strength as 5, but the code implements 6.
